schema_note: Profiles map to ad placement and audience temperature. num_inference_steps and guidance_scale are the primary quality/style levers.

cold_audience_static.label: Cold Audience — Static Photo Ad
cold_audience_static.style_notes: Photorealistic, candid, documentary feel. No visible AI tells. Authenticity over polish.
cold_audience_static.aspect_ratio_note: 4:3 for Facebook feed static — fills the feed without cropping awkwardly on mobile

warm_audience_static.label: Warm Audience — Static Photo Ad
warm_audience_static.style_notes: Slightly warmer colour grade. More intimate framing. Two-person moment over solo.
warm_audience_static.aspect_ratio_note: Square 1:1 for warm retargeting — performs better in both feed and stories adaptation

retargeting_static.label: Retargeting — High-Intent Static
retargeting_static.style_notes: Clean, trustworthy, slightly graphic — can include text-overlay space in lower third. Warmer and more direct than cold.
retargeting_static.aspect_ratio_note: Square adapts to stories with 9:16 crop at top — leave 20% bottom margin clear for text overlay

stories_vertical.label: Stories — Vertical Format
stories_vertical.style_notes: Full-bleed vertical. Subject centred vertically. Leave 15% top and 20% bottom for UI chrome.

high_quality_hero.label: Hero / Landing Page / OOH — Maximum Quality
high_quality_hero.style_notes: Maximum resolution. Photorealistic. Suitable for print if needed. Slower generation — use for approved hero only.
high_quality_hero.aspect_ratio_note: 16:9 widescreen — hero banner, landing page above-fold, Google Display
